intro.text: What’s good, I’m Michael. I spend most of my time  building tracking and management tools using Typescript. Ask me about my latest project.

resume.text: Currently I am working at UNIQA for an corporate startup, contributing to feature development across both the frontend and backend.

work.text: My main project is Intelligent Athletics, an exercise management platform for coaches.

contact.text: I’d love to set up a meeting with you.
